results.rendered_html:
bhāgīrathī [bhagīrathena sānītā tena bhāgīrathī smṛtā]
1 N. of the river Ganges; bhāgīrathīnirjharaśīkarāṇāṃ  Ku. 1. 15. 
2 N. of one of the three main branches of the Ganges.
